summary: Verified the two bug fixes plus signature intro + full end-to-end flow. Backend: 9/9 pytest cases in /app/backend/tests/test_reservations.py pass; /api/inventory returns valid schema with price_inr=1499. Frontend: (1) hero-book-cover renders the actual Book.png (naturalWidth=623, visible bbox 450x593, red hardcover with Hindi title 'मेरी माँ मेरी गैंगस्टर' clearly visible — no opaque back plate); (2) nav-logo is an with the Rajkamal Prakashan logo (naturalWidth=184, loaded); (3) signature-intro overlay appears on load and auto-dismisses within ~3.5s; (4) mouse-hover 3D tilt works (transform changes rotateX/rotateY on mousemove) and book stays visible during hover; (5) Hero/About/Edition/ReservationForm/Footer all render and are interactive after intro; (6) reservation flow end-to-end: form fields filled, submit → form-success-edition = 'No 0012 / 1500', /api/inventory reserved incremented 11 -> 12. Zero console errors/warnings.

minor.issue: Returns 200 (not 201 Created) — non-blocking REST-convention nit (carried over from iteration_1).
edition_number computed via non-atomic aggregate count → duplicate edition numbers possible under concurrent submits (carried over from iteration_1).

critical_code_review_comments: InteractiveBook.jsx — mouse handler updates React state on every mousemove; fine for 60fps here but could be throttled via requestAnimationFrame for lower-end devices.
App.js — SignatureIntro is only mounted on first !introDone; no localStorage persistence so it replays on every full reload. Consider persisting in sessionStorage if user experience calls for it.
server.py — /api/reservations still uses aggregate-then-insert (not atomic). Same concurrency risk as iteration_1.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: One TEST_ reservation created during flow test (edition #12). Reserved count is now 12 / 1500 (1488 remaining). No cleanup endpoint exists.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified visually and programmatically. Book image is the red hardcover PNG rendered via with drop-shadow (no back plate). Nav logo is an from customer-assets. Signature intro overlay uses data-testid='signature-intro' and auto-dismisses at ~3.2s (safe to wait 4s). Playwright must wait for the intro to detach before interacting. Reservation count is at 12; still plenty of headroom to 1500.
rca of the issue: No bugs found — reported fixes verified. The book image is now visible because InteractiveBook.jsx renders the transparent PNG directly with and no red plate div overlaid on top. Nav.jsx now uses an instead of the text 'Rajkamal Prakashan'. SignatureIntro correctly sets phase transitions at 2100ms/2500ms/3200ms and unmounts on 'done'.
